name: review_status
description: Check the current Monocle review status. Returns whether feedback is pending, a pause was requested, or no feedback is available.

name: get_feedback
description: Retrieve review feedback from Monocle. With wait=true, blocks until the reviewer submits feedback.

name: send_artifact
description: Send content to Monocle for the reviewer to see. Provide content directly or pass file_path to read from disk.

name: add_files
description: Add file paths to the current Monocle review session.

name: set_base_ref
description: Review changes you have already committed. Set the commit to diff against (ref) — e.g. the branch you started from, a SHA, or HEAD~N — and Monocle shows everything since it, including your commits, for review. The ref's own changes are excluded. By default Monocle only shows uncommitted working-tree changes, so call this when your work is committed. The base reverts to HEAD automatically once the reviewer submits. Pass reset=true to go back to working-tree review immediately.
